meta.title: Global Logistics Empire — Build a Worldwide Transport Tycoon
meta.description: Global Logistics Empire is a deep tycoon & logistics simulation. Manage trucks, trains, ships and planes, hire staff, research tech, build infrastructure and grow from a single garage to a global empire.
toc.title: Page contents
hero.lead: Build your worldwide freight empire — from a single van in a tiny garage to a global operator commanding trucks, trains, cargo ships and aircraft across every continent. Hire staff, research tech, build depots and turn delivery routes into a profit machine.
hero.info_desc: Designed for players who enjoy tycoon, transport, optimization and long-term business growth.
about.title: About me
about.lead: Hi — I'm the developer behind Global Logistics Empire. A few honest words about what this project is:
about.li1: I'm an amateur developer — this is a passion project, not a studio production.
about.li2: The game is still very much in development and I keep adding new content.
about.li3: Progress is slower because I work on it in my free time, around real life.
about.li4: My goal is to keep improving the game step by step, with the community's help.
numbers.title: The game in numbers
numbers.desc: A massive amount of content to plan, upgrade, unlock and master.
fleet.title: Four transport modes, one global fleet
fleet.desc: Every mode has its own physics, fuel logic, capacity and route network.
fleet.air_desc: Small, medium, large cargo planes & jets
features.title: Core gameplay features
features.desc: Deep simulation systems wrapped in a friendly mobile UI.
features.contracts_desc: Contracts spawn based on reputation, slots and fleet capability. 70% originate from your depot for sensible routing.
features.contracts_li1: Feasibility check by cargo, mode and tags
features.contracts_li2: Special contracts every 12h (or 8h with an ad)
features.map_desc: Interactive Leaflet-based world with CARTO dark tiles, custom Dijkstra routing and animated vehicles travelling in real time.
features.economy_desc: Manage cash, loans, fuel, urea, electricity, vehicle wear, salaries, ad bonuses and global events affecting prices.
upgrades.title: Vehicle customization & upgrades
upgrades.desc: Every vehicle is an individual asset — name it, paint it, upgrade it, attach trailers and keep it running.
upgrades.lv33_desc: Improve speed, capacity, fuel efficiency and special capabilities. Cost multipliers scale per transport mode.
upgrades.lv33_li1: Capability tags unlock special contracts (refrigerated, hazmat, oversized…)
upgrades.lv33_li3: Energy variants — the 2nd model in road/rail groups is fully electric
upgrades.wear_desc: Vehicles wear down with use. Managers can auto-repair when wear drops below 30%, and ad-rewards let free players keep fleets healthy.
upgrades.wear_li1: 22 SVG shapes, colour-coded by transport mode
upgrades.wear_li2: Custom names & emoji prefixes for identification
upgrades.wear_li3: Strict instanceId identity — no ghost vehicles
staff.title: Employees, managers & the dispatcher
staff.desc: You can't run a global empire alone — hire specialists and let them automate the boring parts.
staff.spec_desc: Dispatch is gated by specialized staff — you need the right people to send a truck, train, ship or plane on its way.
staff.mgr_desc: Hire managers and level up their skills — every buff is computed centrally so stacking bonuses always behave correctly.
staff.mgr_li1: Payout bonuses, faster contracts, cheaper repairs
staff.disp_desc: The Dispatcher is a premium automation employee that runs your contract board for you, choosing the most profitable jobs your fleet can fulfil.
staff.disp_li1: Free players: 3 vehicles per bulk-accept click
staff.disp_li2: Premium: 10 per click, up to 54h auto-dispatch
research.title: Research & infrastructure
research.desc: Unlock advanced features through research, then physically build out your operation.
research.tree_desc: Research is mandatory to unlock bulk dispatch, auto features, premium contract generation and advanced logistics tooling.
research.tree_li3: Premium contract generator with nested % controls
research.build_desc: Construct and upgrade depots, garages, workshops, fuel stations, warehouses and logistics hubs. Each building gives flat and percentage bonuses.
research.build_li2: Cheaper fuel, faster repairs, better payouts
meta_systems.title: Progression, rewards & live ops
meta_systems.desc: Long-term goals that keep the empire growing for hundreds of hours.
meta_systems.ach_desc: Tiered milestones with scaling rewards, claim-on-click design and cosmetic unlocks.
meta_systems.badges_desc: Cosmetic progression — show off your status with collectible badges and player titles.
meta_systems.daily_desc: UTC reset streaks, daily challenges with a guaranteed 2-gem reward, and double rewards for Premium.
meta_systems.events_desc: Dynamic real-time modifiers (war, fuel crisis, holiday boom…) reshape the economy on the fly.
meta_systems.res_desc: Diesel, electricity and urea consumption with dedicated upgrades and storage.
meta_systems.gems_desc: Premium currency for instant completes, unlocks, dispatcher boosts and cosmetic perks.
meta_systems.prem_desc: +10% payout, ad-free play, free contract rejects and up to 54h auto-dispatch.
meta_systems.cloud_desc: Google Cloud sync across devices with strict conflict detection so you never lose progress.
trip.title: How a delivery actually works
trip.desc: The simulation engine ticks every 5 in-game minutes and supports 1×–8× speed.
trip.s1_desc: Pick a contract from the board (manually or via the Dispatcher). Feasibility is checked against your fleet.
trip.s2_desc: The assigned vehicle drives from its current location to the pickup city — consuming fuel along the way.
trip.s3_desc: A fixed 0.5h loading phase, then the cargo is hauled along the routed network in real-time.
trip.s4_desc: Payment, reputation (+0.4 base), wear, employee fatigue and offline catch-up are all settled.
tech.title: Built for mobile, ready for the world
tech.desc: Native Android via Capacitor, with a PWA fallback and full localization.
tech.mobile_desc: Safe-area insets, 100dvh layouts, disabled double-tap zoom, native AdMob banner sizing and gesture-friendly map controls.
tech.langs_desc: EN, CS, DE, FR, ES, IT, NL, PL, HU, RO, UA, RU, PT-BR, TR, ID, AR, SV, NO, DA, FI, JA, KO, HI, PK — with safe placeholder interpolation.
tech.save_desc: Base64-obfuscated saves with FNV-1a hash, tamper detection, 3 manual slots + 1 autosave, forced saves on every purchase.
roadmap.title: Future development
roadmap.desc: What I'm planning next. Right now I'm mostly focused on graphical upgrades (better vehicle art and in-game visuals).
roadmap.note: Currently in progress: improved vehicle artwork.
roadmap.f1_desc: Upgraded artwork for vehicles, buildings and UI elements.
roadmap.f2_desc: Engine sounds, ambient audio and UI feedback.
roadmap.f3_desc: Compete with other players globally on revenue, fleet size and milestones.
roadmap.f4_desc: Multi-leg jobs that chain road, rail, sea and air for bigger payouts.
roadmap.f5_desc: Improved geography, road network and regional detail.
roadmap.f6_desc: Team up with friends to grow a shared logistics empire.
feedback.title: Suggestions & feedback
feedback.desc: Tell me what you'd love to see in the game. Every idea helps shape the roadmap.
feedback.msg_ph: What would you love to see in the game?
feedback.sent: Thanks! Your mail client should now open with your message ready to send.
cta.title: Built for tycoon players
cta.desc: If you enjoy route planning, efficiency upgrades and watching a business grow, this game is for you.
footer.title: Global Logistics Empire
footer.text: Official project website hosted on GitHub Pages.
